instruction: Summarize the useful misses captured from the recent orchestrator loop and user corrections.
input: Lock denials, loop fallthrough, incorrect active-task state downgrade, placeholder model panel text, and user corrections about dashboard truth.
output: Useful misses include repeated global write lock denials, the loop incorrectly falling through into queue dispatch after lock denial, the active DAG task being downgraded to pending instead of staying active, placeholder model status text instead of repo-backed collection progress, and repeated user corrections when the DAG tracked the wrong problem. These misses should be preserved as training data and steering memory.
